ddls:
CREATE TABLE "colleges" (
  "college_code" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each college */,
  "college_name" TEXT /* Name of the college */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the college */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the college */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the college */,
  "accreditation_status" TEXT /* Accreditation status of the college */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("college_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "branches" (
  "branch_code" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each branch */,
  "branch_name" TEXT /* Name of the branch */,
  "college_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the college the branch belongs to */,
  "branch_head" TEXT /* Name of the branch head */,
  "contact_information" TEXT /* Contact information of the branch */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the branch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("branch_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_branches_college_code FOREIGN KEY ("college_code") REFERENCES colleges ("college_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_code" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "college_branch_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each detail record */,
  "branch_code" TEXT /* Reference to the branch */,
  "college_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the college */,
  "offered_courses" INTEGER /* Number of offered courses */,
  "backlog_courses" INTEGER /* Number of backlog courses */,
  "backlog_carryover_courses" INTEGER /* Number of courses with backlog and carryover */,
  "modified_backlog_courses" INTEGER /* Number of modified backlog courses */,
  "modified_backlog_default_carryover_courses" INTEGER /* Number of modified backlog courses with default and carryover */,
  "modified_backlog_carryover_only_courses" INTEGER /* Number of modified backlog courses with carryover only */,
  "seats_available" INTEGER /* Number of seats available */,
  "seats_allocated" INTEGER /* Number of seats allocated */,
  "student_count" INTEGER /* Number of students in the branch */,
  "average_student_performance" REAL /* Average student performance in the branch */,
  "faculty_student_ratio" REAL /* Faculty-student ratio in the branch */,
  "infrastructure_rating" REAL /* Infrastructure rating of the branch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_college_branch_details_branch_code FOREIGN KEY ("branch_code") REFERENCES branches ("branch_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_college_branch_details_college_code FOREIGN KEY ("college_code") REFERENCES colleges ("college_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "branch_capacity" (
  "capacity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each capacity record */,
  "branch_code" TEXT /* Reference to the branch */,
  "max_seats" INTEGER /* Maximum number of seats available in the branch */,
  "allocated_seats" INTEGER /* Number of seats allocated in the branch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("capacity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_branch_capacity_branch_code FOREIGN KEY ("branch_code") REFERENCES branches ("branch_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_enrollment" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "branch_code" TEXT /* Reference to the branch */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Reference to the course */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Status of enrollment (e.g., enrolled, pending, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_enrollment_course_code FOREIGN KEY ("course_code") REFERENCES courses ("course_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_enrollment_branch_code FOREIGN KEY ("branch_code") REFERENCES branches ("branch_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Name of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., professor, lecturer) */,
  "college_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the college */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_college_code FOREIGN KEY ("college_code") REFERENCES colleges ("college_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, staff, student) */,
  "college_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the college the user belongs to */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (admin, staff, or student) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_college_code FOREIGN KEY ("college_code") REFERENCES colleges ("college_code")
)
